context: Rural government school in Andhra Pradesh. Students are in Standard 6 and have not had any prior lessons on magnetism. The regular science teacher is watching from the back of the room.
openingScene: You walk into the classroom carrying a china dish with a sandy mixture, a sheet of paper with pins and toothpicks, a bar magnet, and an iron rod. The students are seated on benches. Priya leans forward trying to see what is in the dish. Ravi eyes the bar magnet skeptically. Lakshmi is seated quietly in the back corner. Arjun is slouched near the window, glancing outside. Meena has her notebook open, ready to write down whatever you say.
